name: sylvanis
description: Nature, Rage, and Survival. The architecture of the Ironbark Root.

templates.name: Ironbark Overgrowth
templates.description: A dense tangle of petrified tree-roots forming a massive gate. The vines here are as strong as iron chains.

templates.name: Living Root-Chamber
templates.description: A massive hollow within an ancient tree-trunk. The walls are lined with pulsing bioluminescent fungi that provide a soft green light.

templates.name: Primal Ancestor Grove
templates.description: A secluded grove where the spirits of the wild are strongest. A single ancient oak stands at the center, its roots drinking from a clear spring.

templates.name: The Arena of Survival
templates.description: A deep, circular pit lined with the massive rib-bones of long-dead predators. Here, the strongest prove their worth in bloody combat.

templates.name: The Fang & Pelt
templates.description: A trading post built from massive rib-bones and leather. Skinned pelts hang from the beams, and the air smells of blood and smoke.

templates.name: Ritual of Strength
templates.description: A cleared patch of earth where the soil is packed hard by generations of fighters. To belong here is to survive the trials.

templates.name: Healing Ancestor-Spring
templates.description: Clear water bubbles up through ancient roots into a basin of smooth river stones. Drinking here feels as if the spirits are washing away your fatigue.

templates.name: Ironbark Hollows
templates.description: Small, cozy dwellings woven directly into the upper branches of the ironbark trees. They sway gently in the wind, secure and high above the jungle floor.

templates.name: Primal Pillar
templates.description: A massive pillar of carved wood and bone, depicting the ancient beast-spirits. It stands as a warning to intruders and a source of strength to the pack.
